input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.15 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.15
            TITLE: cost scenario

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.15: Cost Scenario
S.3.15 Cost Scenario 
The Cost Scenario will be provided prior to the competition on the FSAE Online website 
The Cost Scenario will include detailed information about the conduct, scope, and conditions 
of the Cost Scenario

final_answer: rule S.3.15: Cost Scenario S.3.15 Cost Scenario The Cost Scenario will be provided prior to the competition on the FSAE Online website The Cost Scenario will include detailed information about the conduct, scope, and conditions of the Cost Scenario
